About Us · हाम्रो बारेमा

Rising & Growing Together Since 1997

Pharma Medico began as a trusted medicine stockist in Janakpur Dham, serving the healthcare needs of Madhesh Province. Today, we are one of the region's most reliable authorized pharmaceutical distributors.

Authorized Stockist10+ reputed pharma companies
Fast Distribution6+ districts of Madhesh
Genuine Medicines100% authentic products
500+ ClientsPharmacies & healthcare providers
Director & Proprietor
Biltu Prasad Sah

"स्वास्थ्य सेवामा विश्वसनीय साझेदार — हामी गुणस्तरीय औषधि वितरणमा प्रतिबद्ध छौं।"

"Committed to being your trusted partner in healthcare — delivering quality medicines across Madhesh Province."

Get In Touch Our Services

Services · सेवाहरू

Bridging The Supply Chain

Comprehensive medicine distribution and stockist services for healthcare providers across Madhesh Province.

Enquire Now

Wholesale Distribution

Bulk medicine supply with competitive pricing, seamless ordering and dedicated account support for pharmacies and clinics across Madhesh Province.

थोक वितरण — प्रतिस्पर्धी मूल्यमा बल्क मेडिसिन आपूर्ति

Learn More

Last-Mile Delivery

Reliable, timely delivery across Dhanusha, Mahottari, Sarlahi, Saptari, Siraha and Sindhuli — ensuring medicines reach where they're needed most.

अन्तिम माइल डेलिभरी — ६+ जिल्लामा समयमा डेलिभरी

Learn More

Warehousing & Storage

Safe, organized storage at Campus Chowk, Janakpur Dham, with proper temperature management and inventory control for all pharmaceutical products.

भण्डारण — सुरक्षित र व्यवस्थित गोदाम सुविधा

Learn More

Authorized Stockist Services

As authorized stockists for 10+ leading pharma companies, we ensure genuine, quality-assured medicines with proper documentation and regulatory compliance.

अधिकृत स्टकिस्ट — १०+ कम्पनीका अधिकृत एजेन्ट

Learn More

Why Choose Us · हामीलाई किन रोज्ने

Rise & Grow With Us

Six reasons why pharmacies and clinics across Madhesh Province trust Pharma Medico.

100% Genuine Medicines

All products sourced directly from authorized manufacturers — zero counterfeit risk.

27+ Years of Trust

Established in 1997, a proven track record of reliability in Madhesh Province.

Wide District Coverage

Serving 6+ districts: Dhanusha, Mahottari, Sarlahi, Saptari, Siraha & Sindhuli.

Competitive Pricing

Fair and transparent pricing that helps your pharmacy or clinic improve margins.

Dedicated Support

Responsive team always ready to assist with orders, queries and product guidance.

Full Documentation

Proper invoices, PAN compliance and all regulatory paperwork handled correctly.

Products · उत्पादनहरू

Diverse & Cost-Effective Selection

Serving pharmacies and clinics with a wide range of quality pharmaceutical products across all categories.

Tablets & Capsules

Oral solid dosage forms including tablets, capsules, strip packs and blister packs from all major authorized brands.

View Brands

Syrups, Tonics & Liquids

Liquid oral formulations including syrups, suspensions, tonics and paediatric preparations from trusted manufacturers.

View Brands

Topicals, Injectables & More

Topical gels, ointments, injectable vials, ampoules, eye drops and ear drops across all therapeutic categories.

View Brands
